source: Creator Monetize — Community, Customer Tracking, Product, Onboarding + Hiring + Course Outline

community.name: Living Community Framework
community.concept: Mesh network (all members connected) vs hub-and-spoke (everyone talks only to guru)
leader_checks: Are members taking care of each other?

coaching_call_types.qa: Open format, let conversation flow, stay overtime if needed
coaching_call_types.lesson: Prepared topic, relevant to students' current level

rationalization_process.name: Post-Purchase Psychology
rationalization_process.critical_window: First 48 hours after purchase are critical. This is when refunds happen.

parts.name: Handoff
parts.description: Instant communication after purchase. No delays.

parts.name: Understanding
parts.description: Show where everything is, how to use it, how to get support.

parts.name: Answering Questions
parts.description: Put yourself in customer shoes. Get 10 friends to test the flow and report confusion.

parts.name: Direction
parts.description: Show the roadmap, give a welcome, get them to use the product immediately.

platform_setup.recommended: Skool for community + Whop for payments
eleven_step_checklist: Set up Categories (5 mandatory: Announcements, Success Stories, Introduction, Open Chat, Questions)

quality_attributes: Steal like an artist (study and adapt great work)

six_step_process.name: Find
six_step_process.description: Search 15-20 Facebook/Discord groups for video editors

six_step_process.name: Post Job Info
six_step_process.description: Post detailed job description with expectations and compensation

six_step_process.name: Screen
six_step_process.description: Use Google Form with 8 screening questions to filter applicants

six_step_process.name: Onboarding
six_step_process.description: Set up Slack, share training videos, provide SOPs

three_question_method.name: 3 Questions Per Roadmap Stage
questions: What is the goal of this stage?
What do people need to know to reach the goal?
How to accelerate? (What can be cut away?)

process: Work backwards from the end goal
Trim the fat — remove anything that doesn't accelerate results
course_outline_building.principle: Get results AS FAST AS POSSIBLE. V1 won't be perfect — ship it and iterate.

customer_tracking.name: Guardrails + Superhero Moments + 3 Flywheels
guardrails: Share roadmap (clean PDF of path to dream outcome)
Create tracker (spreadsheet students share with you)
Create assessments (proof of action — videos, screenshots)
customer_tracking.superhero_moments: Use tracker data to proactively message struggling students before they ask for help

flywheels.testimonial: Student joins → material → posts wins → video testimonial → use to get more students → repeat
flywheels.feedback: Student has feedback → fills form → you review → implement if it helps dream outcome faster
flywheels.improvement: Create material → learn something new → update material → repeat

customer_tracking.scaling_rule: One person can track ~50 students. Beyond that, promote successful student to admin.

product.thought_exercise: If you had only 1 customer and that 1 customer was the only way to grow — how would you treat that person?
